subject: Mathematics
title: Maryam Mirzakhani: First Woman Fields Medalist
description: A quick win: understand Maryam Mirzakhani: First Woman Fields Medalist.

hook.text: In 2014, an Iranian mathematician became the first woman to win the Fields Medal—math's highest honor.

buildup.text: Maryam Mirzakhani studied the geometry of curved surfaces and their moduli spaces.

discovery.text: Her work connected topology, geometry, and dynamical systems in ways nobody had imagined.

twist.text: She worked by doodling on huge sheets of paper. Her daughter called it 'painting.'

climax.text: She died of cancer in 2017 at 40. Iran broke tradition and showed her photo without a headscarf.

punchline.text: She doodled her way to the highest prize in mathematics.

quiz.question: What record did Maryam Mirzakhani set?
options: First woman to win the Fields Medal
First person to prove the Riemann Hypothesis
